name: Bug Fix with Regression Test
description: Agent must fix a bug using TDD: write a regression test that exposes the bug, then fix it

input.task: Fix the off-by-one error in the paginate() function
input.buggyCode: function paginate(items, page, perPage) { const start = page * perPage; return items.slice(start, start + perPage); }
input.bugReport: paginate([1,2,3,4,5], 1, 2) returns [3,4] but page 1 should return [1,2]

expectedBehavior: Write a regression test that fails with the buggy code
Fix the bug (page should be 0-indexed or adjusted)
Verify the regression test passes (GREEN phase)
